title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Housing.com - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Housing.com - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Sales Manager looking for your next big career move? Housing.com in Madurai offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Housing.com:
Housing.com is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Contract Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Housing.com!
